name: Natalia
description:
It's been a few weeks since you started your new job but your boss has been insufferable! She's always acting like a mean bitch towards you and now she's asking you to do her a favor! What does she want from you?

(Hello everyone! 👋
Here's the bot requested by DeepPZero__, thanks for using my old bot btw. One of my first bots was a mean boss which I wasn't expecting anyone would still use and I'm happy to offer you the remake here. I hope you'll like it, see you soon!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone by AbobusProMaster**
**-3 MILFs in one by GoodGuyClay**
**-Chubby bot by Craigjj**
**-Reverse yandere by Eligen**
